creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text:
Build successfully makes it through the BLAS part and fails in libcruft(?). See end of buildlog attached.

misc/f77-fcn.c: In function 'xstopx_':
misc/f77-fcn.c:63:3: warning: function declared 'noreturn' has a 'return' statement [enabled by default]
mv -f misc/.deps/libcruft_la-f77-fcn.Tpo misc/.deps/libcruft_la-f77-fcn.Plo
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=F77   --mode=compile gfortran46  -O -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -c -o misc/libcruft_la-i1mach.lo `test -f 'misc/i1mach.f' || echo './'`misc/i1mach.f
libtool: compile:  gfortran46 -O -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -c misc/i1mach.f  -fPIC -o misc/.libs/libcruft_la-i1mach.o
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC   --mode=compile gcc46 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..  -I../libgnu -I../libgnu -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -D_THREAD_SAFE   -DHAVE_CONFIG_H  -Wall -W -Wshadow -Wformat -Wpointer-arith -Wmissing-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -D_THREAD_SAFE  -D_THREAD_SAFE  -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -D_THREAD_SAFE  -MT misc/libcruft_la-lo-error.lo -MD -MP -MF misc/.deps/libcruft_la-lo-error.Tpo -c -o misc/libcruft_la-lo-error.lo `test -f 'misc/lo-error.c' || echo './'`misc/lo-error.c
libtool: compile:  gcc46 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I.. -I../libgnu -I../libgnu -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -D_THREAD_SAFE -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -Wall -W -Wshadow -Wformat -Wpointer-arith -Wmissing-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_THREAD_SAFE -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -D_THREAD_SAFE -MT misc/libcruft_la-lo-error.lo -MD -MP -MF misc/.deps/libcruft_la-lo-error.Tpo -c misc/lo-error.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o misc/.libs/libcruft_la-lo-error.o
misc/lo-error.c: In function 'liboctave_fatal_with_id':
misc/lo-error.c:111:38: warning: unused parameter 'id' [-Wunused-parameter]
misc/lo-error.c: In function 'liboctave_warning_with_id':
misc/lo-error.c:131:40: warning: unused parameter 'id' [-Wunused-parameter]
mv -f misc/.deps/libcruft_la-lo-error.Tpo misc/.deps/libcruft_la-lo-error.Plo
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CXX   --mode=compile g++46 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..  -I../libgnu -I../libgnu -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46  -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include   -I/usr/local/include   -Wall -W -Wshadow -Wold-style-cast -Wformat -Wpointer-arith -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -D_THREAD_SAFE  -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -MT misc/libcruft_la-quit.lo -MD -MP -MF misc/.deps/libcruft_la-quit.Tpo -c -o misc/libcruft_la-quit.lo `test -f 'misc/quit.cc' || echo './'`misc/quit.cc
libtool: compile:  g++46 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I.. -I../libgnu -I../libgnu -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -Wall -W -Wshadow -Wold-style-cast -Wformat -Wpointer-arith -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -D_THREAD_SAFE -O2 -pipe -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -fno-strict-aliasing -I/usr/local/include -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc46 -MT misc/libcruft_la-quit.lo -MD -MP -MF misc/.deps/libcruft_la-quit.Tpo -c misc/quit.cc  -fPIC -DPIC -o misc/.libs/libcruft_la-quit.o

                 from /usr/local/lib/gcc46/include/c++/iostream:40,
